steps.title: Use the time marker
steps.content: The phrase "nearly 150 years ago" places Van Gogh's action at a definite completed time in the past. The verb in the blank must match that past-time signal.

steps.title: Choose past tense
steps.content: A is present progressive, B is future tense, and D is present perfect progressive. Each conflicts with a completed action from nearly 150 years ago. The simple past form fits. The answer is C.
